name: Fall of the Fallen
desc:
When your opponent activates a card or effect: Tribute 1 monster that used "Fallen of Albaz" as Fusion Material; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it, then you can banish up to 2 Dragon Fusion Monsters from your GY, and if you do, destroy cards your opponent controls equal to the number of cards banished.
You can only activate 1 "Fall of the Fallen" per turn.
